message:
🐛 Simplify copilot-automation workflow

- Remove status and check_run triggers that were causing issues
- Combine all logic into single step for reliability
- Use Unicode escape for emoji to avoid encoding issues
- Keep only pull_request_target and workflow_dispatch triggers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
